Andrea Oliva b2b Davide Squillace | Extrema Outdoor | Netherlands
programme.desc: Enjoy ANTS taking over Extrema Outdoor NL 2017 with an explosive b2b performance of Andrea Oliva and Davide Squillace made of powerful tech house topped with catchy vocals.

programme.title: Prismode & Solvane | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Prismode & Solvane at the HauptstadtfloÃŸ Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Nikk. | Chasing Sunsets x UV at Notte Bianca | Valletta Ditch (Malta)
programme.desc: Nikk. closes the night at Chasing Sunsets x UV during Notte Bianca 2025 in Valletta Ditch, Malta, with a tech and house-driven set that locks into pure late-night groove. Surrounded by the historic energy of Valletta and the festivalâ€™s glowing ambiance, his finale delivers a smooth, hypnotic flow that brings the celebration to a perfect close.

programme.title: Roman Weber | Fairytale of the Knights | Riegersburg Castle | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performs at the Riegersburg Castle on the edge of an extinct Vulcano.

programme.title: Fedde Le Grand | De Keukenhof (The Garden of Europe) | Lisse (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the magic of Fedde Le Grand at De Keukenhof, also known as The Garden of Europe, in Lisse, Netherlands.

programme.title: Mayze x Faria | Xplaces Castelo de GuimarÃ£es | Portugal
programme.desc: After Amares and Viana do Castelo in 2020, the video project X Places will have its new edition in the cradle of the nation, in the city of GuimarÃ£es, more precisely in Castelo de GuimarÃ£es.

programme.title: Greenjack | Radio Intense | Girona (Spain)
programme.desc: Greenjack exclusive DJ set for Radio Intense in Girona, Spain.

programme.title: Volt & State | Protocol X ADE 2015 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Journey back to a memorable night during Amsterdam Dance Event 2015, where dynamic duo Volt & State delivered an unforgettable set at Protocol Recordings' showcase.

programme.title: Away To: Kfardebian with C EL b2b G! - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: You are watching "Away To" with Factory People and Creative State. A series of socially distant musical gatherings with cool places and cool people.

programme.title: ATB | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: ATB playing on mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Dj Boring | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with DJ Boring at Wonderland 2024 in Paris, France.

programme.title: VNTM (live) | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for an electrifying live experience with VNTM at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Away To: Faqra with Lehar - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: A name we know all too well, Lehar headlines our Away To Faqra.

programme.title: Mees Salome | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating musical journey with Mees SalomÃ© at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Carl Cox | The Revolution at Space | Ibiza
programme.desc: The King of Clubs rocks the main room of Space once again as a packed floor explodes to his throbbing mix of tribal, techno, and tech house sounds. 'The Revolution Continues' after the jump.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos | Sunwaves | Mamaia (Romania)
programme.desc: Ricardo Villalobos will take you on a unique journey with his performance at the Sunwaves festival in Mamaia (Romania). He starts off slow and ingeniously builds and builds his set to end in a massive explosion of party-madness.

programme.title: Away To: Baadaran Airport with Pomme Rouge - By Late Knights & Creative State (Lebanon)
programme.desc: In the mountains of Baadaran in the south of Lebanon lies an abandoned airport, the perfect playground for a party, cruising through the airways with electro duo Pomme Rouge

programme.title: Various Artists | Ultra Music Festival 2019 | Croatia
programme.desc: Experience the sound of summer at Ultra Music Festival Europe. This video brings together standout tracks from various artists who define the energy, scale, and pulse of one of the worldâ€™s biggest electronic music festivals.

programme.title: Stefanie Raschke | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w Stefanie Raschke, recorded at Pacha Munich. Pacha may be closed at the time of filming due to the COVID-19 pandemic but the beat lives on!

programme.title: Nicole Moudaber | Loveland Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Loveland Festival was in full swing when Nicole Moudaber took control of the booth. She delivered an hour of fine techno tunes, starting off with deep and dark vibes occasionally introducing sensuous vocals and building up her set towards more industrial feeling.

programme.title: Emanuel Satie | Laute Wiese RECD. at Lil Tiger Rooftop Terrace | Essen (Germany)
programme.desc: Panoramic DJ set by Emanuel Satie (Cocoon) on the Lil Tiger Rooftop Terrace in Essen, Germany.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Joris Voorn | Kingsnight 2020 | De Marktkantine | Netherlands
programme.desc: Amsterdam club in lockdown celebrating the national day.

programme.title: Nicole Moudaber | Beatport at Savaya Resort | Bali (Indonesia)
programme.desc: Nicole Moudaber delivers electrifying beats at the stunning Savaya Resort in Bali.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets - Castello Zamittello | Mgarr (Malta)
programme.desc: Under the carob trees and on the path of History, the Chasing Sunsets seriesâ€™ first event for 2023 will be taking you to another unique location! Castello Zamittello, right in the back garden area of the 19th century landmark located on the outskirts of Mgarr in Malta.

programme.title: De Sluwe Vos | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Get ready for a wild ride with De Sluwe Vos at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos & Luciano | Love Family Park | Mainz (Germany)
programme.desc: Displaying all the skill and unique personalities that have entranced fans internationally for over a decade, Villalobos and Luciano bring the heat in this all-vinyl set.

programme.title: Moonbootica | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Rocking house sounds of Moonbootica for the Pacha On Air series recorded at Pacha Munich. Enjoy!

programme.title: Gregor Tresher (live) | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a live electronic extravaganza with Gregor Tresher at 909 Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Mollono.Bass | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Monollo.Bass at the Friedrichstadt-Palast Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Chrissi D. | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Enjoy the groovy and very danceable house music selection of Chrissy D. recorded in Munich for Pacha on Air series and packed with timeless classics presented on vinyl! Nobody stand still!

programme.title: DJ Ruby | Chasing Sunsets at Notte Bianca | Valetta (Malta)
programme.desc: Experience the enchanting sounds of DJ Ruby as Chasing Sunsets graces Notte Bianca in the historic city of Valletta, Malta.

programme.title: REVOL | Radio Intense | Herakleia (Turkey)
programme.desc: REVOL from magical antique ruins of Herakleia in Turkey.

programme.title: Steve Angello | Alfa Future People | Russia
programme.desc: At Alfa Future People Festival, Steve Angello showcased his signature sound of progressive house beats.

programme.title: Wildstylez, Bass Modulators, Coone, Isaac, Pavo, Luna and more | Defqon 1 Dragonblood | Netherlands
programme.desc: A powerhouse lineup featuring Wildstylez, Bass Modulators, Coone, Isaac, Pavo, Luna, and more unleashes pure hardstyle energy at Defqon.1 Dragonblood in the Netherlands. Explosive sets, epic visuals, and the raw spirit of the Q-dance nation collide in this unforgettable celebration of harder styles.

programme.title: Greenjack | Radio Intense | Girona (Spain)
programme.desc: Greenjack exclusive DJ set for Radio Intense in Girona, Spain.

programme.title: Rose Ringed | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the evocative beats of Rose Ringed at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Tujamo | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Tujamo taking over the mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Giuseppe Ottaviani | Luminosity | ADE 2019 | Netherlands
programme.desc: Giuseppe Ottaviani DJ set at Luminosity, ADE 2019.

programme.title: Felix Raphael (live) | Vibrancy Music at Bergisel Innsbruck | Austria
programme.desc: Felix Raphael is playing an exclusive live set at Bergisel Innsbruck (Austria) for Vibrancy Music. Enjoy the spectacular views over Innsbruck and let yourself be enchanted by Felix's sound and his voice.

programme.title: Super Flu | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air with the incredible duo of Super Flu. Listen to their smooth and moody mix of melodic tech house recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Super Flu | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air with the incredible duo of Super Flu. Listen to their smooth and moody mix of melodic tech house recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Super Flu | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air with the incredible duo of Super Flu. Listen to their smooth and moody mix of melodic tech house recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Edu Imbernon | DropTV | Aüra Mallorca Edition | Spain
programme.desc: Outdoor sunset session from the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: DJ Rush | Blakksheep Showcase | ADE2015 | Dockyard Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Blakksheep's showcase at Dockyard Festival was in for a perfect ending when DJ Rush stepped behind the decks. He delivered a powerful performance filled with heavy techno beats. His relentless energy spoke to his crowd, which reciprocated in ceaseless dancing and loads of hand-waving.

programme.title: Joyhauser | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a high-octane sonic adventure with Joyhauser at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Away To: Baadaran Airport with Pomme Rouge - By Late Knights & Creative State (Lebanon)
programme.desc: In the mountains of Baadaran in the south of Lebanon lies an abandoned airport, the perfect playground for a party, cruising through the airways with electro duo Pomme Rouge

programme.title: Various Artists | DGTL 2019 - Highlights | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Step into the vibrant world of DGTL 2019 in Amsterdam with this highlight video featuring standout sets from a cutting-edge lineup of electronic artists. Feel the pulse of the crowd, the power of the music, and the unique atmosphere that made this edition truly unforgettable.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos & Luciano | Love Family Park | Mainz (Germany)
programme.desc: Displaying all the skill and unique personalities that have entranced fans internationally for over a decade, Villalobos and Luciano bring the heat in this all-vinyl set.

programme.title: Steve Bug | The Art Labyrinth by dan-tz & Dance TV | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a sonic exploration with Steve Bug at The Art Labyrinth, presented by dan-tz & Dance TV in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Enzo Siragusa | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the magnetic beats of Enzo Siragusa at Music On Festival 2023 in the enchanting city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Oliver Huntemann | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin ( Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Oliver Huntemann at Körperwelten Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Pacho | Birthday 2020 at Cacao Beach | Sunny Beach (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Another incredible birthday event of the established Bulgarian DJ and producer Pacho.

programme.title: Morten | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Morten playing on Mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Amiti | Tau House Guatape | Colombia
programme.desc: Beautiful melodic tech performance of Amiti at Tau House Guatape, Colombia.

programme.title: I am Hardwell | Living The Dream - Documentary | Netherlands
programme.desc: Even more than the previous movie 'I AM Hardwell - Living the dream' will let you experience the music.

programme.title: Away To: Baadaran Airport with Audioblend & Whoisbibz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Lebanon
programme.desc: An abandoned airport, the perfect playground for a party.

programme.title: Roman Weber | Fairytale of the Knights | Riegersburg Castle | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performs at the Riegersburg Castle on the edge of an extinct Vulcano.

programme.title: George Privatti | elrow - El Bowsque Encantado 2019 | Soho Beach DXB | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: Welcome to part 1 of elrow Dubai's carnival at the exclusive Soho Garden DXB venue. Let's get the party started with George Privatti and his vibrant tech house tracks rocking a dancefloor full of colourful elrow fans!

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 250 at The Gorge Amphitheatre | USA
programme.desc: Above & Beyond's Group Therapy 250 at The Gorge Amphitheatre, USA, marks a legendary milestone in a breathtaking setting.

programme.title: Colyn | Hangar Grand Place | Brussels (Belgium)
programme.desc: Hangar went live on June 10th with Colyn from the centre of the most important tourist destination in Brussels - The Grand Place - at sunrise.

programme.title: Various Artists | Creamfields 2018 Highlights | United Kingdom
programme.desc: Creamfields 2018 was a landmark edition celebrating the festivalâ€™s 21st anniversary in Daresbury, Cheshire.

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.
